title: Snap Inc. Announces First Quarter 2025 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces First Quarter 2025 Financial Results

Q1 2025 Financial Performance

Revenue for Q1 2025 was $1,363 million, compared to $1,237 million in the prior year, an increase of 10% year-over-year. Daily active users were 476 million in Q1 2025, an increase of 44 million or 10% year-over-year. Net loss was $140 million in Q1 2025, compared to $305 million in the prior year.

Profitability and Cash Flow

Adjusted EBITDA was $108 million in Q1 2025, compared to $(46) million in the prior year. Operating cash flow was $151 million in Q1 2025, compared to $88 million in the prior year. Free cash flow was $114 million, compared to $38 million in the prior year.

Key Metrics

Monthly active users reached 930 million, representing 5% year-over-year growth. Snapchat+ subscriptions continued to grow, with over 7 million paying subscribers. Revenue diversification efforts through non-advertising sources showed positive momentum.

Q2 2025 Guidance

Management provided Q2 2025 revenue guidance of $1.34-1.38 billion, representing growth of 12-16% year-over-year, indicating continued momentum into the second quarter.
